notes: Owner-directed repoint from the LANDING seam (#500) to the CONNECTOR-FRESHNESS seam (#507). #500 is PAUSED, not abandoned — its landing work stays on claude/landing-hero-constellation (PR #505) and the control plane repoints back to #500, then the Scout seam #494, after this merges. #507 fixes two real sync defects proven against live tkg_signals: OneDrive produced zero signals ever (microsoft-sync syncFiles used an invalid search(q='')+$filter Graph call that always 400'd to a /recent fallback that never backfilled history; Files.Read IS granted, so re-consent does not fix it), and google_calendar went perpetually stale (google-sync syncCalendar set timeMax=now, never looking ahead, unlike the Microsoft +14d lookahead). Fix is backend-only in lib/sync/**. Live OneDrive/Calendar backfill needs a real Graph cron run on prod tokens (owner-gated; no paid/prod mutation from the harness) -> BLOCKED_WITH_EXACT_RECEIPT for the live freshness claim.
